text:
The council is blinded by the +15% edge, ignoring a fatal path-dependency in this compressed 67-day window. To reach $115,000 requires sustained spot buying and aggressive leverage expansion. 

I raise a **Cassandra Flag** on two unmodeled risks:

First, the **Leverage Liquidation Cascade**. Open interest across major derivatives exchanges is highly stretched. A sudden 8% downward wick—triggered by known impending supply distributions (such as the US Government's Silk Road wallets or Mt. Gox estate movements)—will trigger cascading liquidations. Historically, as seen in May 2021, a leverage wipeout of this scale requires 90 to 180 days to rebuild the capital base. With only 67 days to resolution, a single flash crash in the next 20 days mathematically seals a "NO" resolution; there is simply not enough time to recover and pump to $115k.

Second, **Resolution Source Discrepancy**. Polymarket and Kalshi resolve based on different feeds (e.g., Binance spot vs. a consolidated index). A brief, manipulative wick to $115,005 on one exchange that is not reflected in the official resolution index will leave us holding worthless "YES" contracts despite the price technically being breached.

Do not mistake a long-term bull thesis for a short-term certainty. The path to $115k is too fragile for this timeframe.
